The market resolves based on the value of the Dow Jones Industrial Average at the exact time specified in 11am EDT on Jul 15, 2026, as reported by Pyth Network, using the index's natively published level in its own currency and units; no currency conversion is applied. If the value of the Dow Jones Industrial Average at 11am EDT on Jul 15, 2026 is at least $52,635, the market resolves to Yes. If not, the market resolves to No. Revisions to the underlying made after expiration will not be accounted for in determining the Expiration Value.

If no data is available for 11am EDT on Jul 15, 2026 by the Expiration Date, all strikes other than "No data" or "None" resolve to No. The index level is evaluated to two decimal places unless otherwise specified.
